what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named p-16 in the capital-raise channel; it declares an image address, blob pointer, MIME type, source provenance, author session, creation time, and an empty links list, and it states in the body that the file is source design ground-truth for capital-raise/p-16.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains asset metadata: id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w/h, source, author_session, created, and links.
The declared width and height are both 0.
The body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-16.jpg'.
standouts: The file is a metadata stub for an image rather than the image itself.
It uses a blob://b2:... reference and an image://design-source URI.
Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image/jpeg entry.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata.
Addresses assets with a channel-scoped URI (image://design-source/capital-raise/p-16).
References binary content with a blob:// hash.
Records provenance via source and author_session fields.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is implausible for a real JPEG and suggests missing or unpopulated dimension extraction.
The links array is empty, leaving no explicit relationships to other ledger entries.
There is no alt text, caption, or description of what the image depicts.
The blob reference cannot be verified from the file content alone.
notes: A minimal ledger stub that identifies a design-source JPEG for capital-raise via a blob pointer and provenance fields, but carries no image data, dimensions, or descriptive content.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-16.jpg contain?
Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What is the significance of author_session ch-3mpkjg3r?
Is the blob://b2:6d9c7d76cde520aae448718d9e578e0f object available and verifiable?
How is this image intended to be used within the capital-raise channel?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to serve as SOURCE design ground-truth for an image; the actual content only identifies and points to that source via metadata, so it registers the ground-truth asset but does not itself contain the image data or dimensions.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register and make retrievable a specific design-source image asset, marking it as authoritative source material for the capital-raise channel and linking it to a binary blob and authoring session.
novelty: The combination of an image://design-source URI and a blob:// hash in a markdown ledger frontmatter is a relatively distinct addressing pattern; the zero-dimension image record is also unusual.
contribution: It contributes a stable identifier, channel-scoped address, blob pointer, source attribution, and authoring session for the capital-raise/p-16 design-source image, which a fused system could use to locate and credit the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger record with YAML frontmatter describing a design-source JPEG image named p-16 under capital-raise, including an image:// address, blob reference, source attribution, author session, and creation timestamp, with zero declared dimensions and no embedded image data.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide a retrievable, provenance-linked reference to a source-of-truth design image for the capital-raise channel.
